sprint_checks.check: src/lib/analytics.ts — correct mastery% for known state sets
sprint_checks.details: computeTopicStats returns 11 TopicStat entries. All-new records → score 0. isReadyToTest false at score=0. computeEstimatedScore uses question-count-weighted formula.

sprint_checks.check: src/hooks/useSession.ts — session starts, answers recorded, fast-tap buffered
sprint_checks.details: startSession builds queue and creates SessionRecord in store. recordAnswer applies applyAnswer() for deliberate answers (with lastMaintenanceSession tracking) or appends to fastTapPending for fast-taps, advances currentIndex. nextQuestion flushes fastTapPending or marks isComplete + increments sessionCount.

sprint_checks.check: src/hooks/useSync.ts — manualSave triggers POST, restoreBackup triggers GET
sprint_checks.details: auto-sync setInterval(60s) POSTs when isDirty, markClean on success. manualSave POSTs and throws on error. restoreBackup GETs and throws 'no_backup_found' when data is null. Merges restored questions into store.
Build completes successfully: 31 modules transformed, dist/sw.js and dist/manifest.webmanifest generated.

requirements_covered.notes: Analytics computations (topicStats, estimatedScore, isReadyToTest) fully implemented
useSession hook handles full session lifecycle: start, track, fast-tap, complete
useSync provides auto-sync, manual save, and restore backup
